root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'YYYY') as begin_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'MONTH') as begin_month, count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as c_count, sum(sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve) as c_real, sum(sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount) as c_app, sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as c_app_1,
sum(( select coalesce(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_receipt where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in('CLR','TRL') and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no )) as old_loan,
sum((SELECT coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount),0) FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no --and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20')) as dep_amount_66,
sum(( select coalesce(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_receipt where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in('CLR','TRL') and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no )) as old_int
from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and extract(year from (sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract)::date) = '!year_1!' and extract(month from (sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract)::date) = '!month_1!' and coalesce(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group,'0') not in ('99')
group by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract
order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group
